steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that something about the book “has been very positive,” supported by evidence of reviewer praise and an award. The blank requires a noun phrase that logically pairs with “positive.”

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Response to” captures the target meaning—the critical response to the book is what can logically be “positive.” The other three choices either contradict a positive reception (neglect and confusion are inherently negative) or describe something unrelated to how the book was received (inspiration for refers to what inspired the book's creation). That matches choice A — A is correct.
